description: Canonical Payme JSON-RPC error responses. All carry HTTP 200; the error lives in the `error` member (TD-18 exception for Payme, per Lane B decision). Account-field errors live in the -31050..-31099 band and name the offending field in `data`.

auth_failed.note: HTTP Basic Paycom:<key> wrong or missing

unknown_method.note: JSON-RPC method not in the handler set

unknown_transaction.note: Perform/Cancel/Check on an id that was never created

cannot_perform.note: state transition not allowed (e.g. perform an already-cancelled txn)

second_concurrent_transaction.note: another in-progress transaction already exists for this account
